metadata.description: Name of the azd environment. Used to derive resource names.
Primary region (Function App + APIM + primary Content Safety account + storage + monitoring).
Secondary region for the second Content Safety account.
Object id of the principal to grant developer roles (Cognitive Services User on each Content Safety account, Key Vault Secrets User on the KV when external cache is on). Leave empty in CI.
Provision Azure Managed Redis + Key Vault and bind AMR as the APIM external cache. Default false (APIM internal cache).
AMR SKU when useExternalCache=true. Default Balanced_B0 (~$80/mo, no SLA, fine for dev).

Region for Azure Managed Redis. Leave empty (default) to co-locate with the primary location; override (e.g. via AZURE_REDIS_LOCATION) when the primary region has capacity issues for the chosen Redis SKU. Cross-region traffic from APIM to Redis is TCP-only and adds a few ms of latency.
Idempotency cache TTL in seconds for blocklist mutations. Range 60-604800. Default 3600.
Enable irreversible Key Vault purge protection. Leave false in dev.
Browser CORS allow-list for the Function App. Default: empty array (server-to-server only). Add specific origins (e.g. ["https://app.contoso.com"]) when calling from a browser-hosted SPA.
Maximum request body in bytes accepted by the Function before returning 413. Default 10 MiB matches the Content Safety image hard limit.
F0 = free (limited TPS); S0 = standard. Default S0 to support batch + groundedness.
F0 = free (limited TPS); S0 = standard. Default S0 to support batch + groundedness.

variables.$fxv#0:
<!--
  API-level base policy.
  - Sets the round-robin pool as the default backend.
  - Authenticates upstream with APIM's managed identity (Cognitive Services
    audience).
  - Retries on 429/5xx three times with exponential-ish backoff.
  - Echoes a correlation id (W3C traceparent or x-ms-client-request-id) on
    every response.

  __POOL_BACKEND_ID__ is replaced at deploy time by apim.bicep with the actual
  pool backend name (currently "cs-pool").
-->
<policies>
  <inbound>
    <base />
    <set-backend-service backend-id="__POOL_BACKEND_ID__" />
    <authentication-managed-identity resource="https://cognitiveservices.azure.com" />
    <set-header name="x-correlation-id" exists-action="skip">
      <value>@(context.RequestId.ToString())</value>
    </set-header>
  </inbound>
  <backend>
    <retry condition="@(context.Response.StatusCode == 429 || (context.Response.StatusCode >= 500 && context.Response.StatusCode < 600))"
           count="3"
           interval="1"
           max-interval="10"
           delta="2"
           first-fast-retry="false">
      <forward-request buffer-request-body="true" />
    </retry>
  </backend>
  <outbound>
    <base />
    <set-header name="x-correlation-id" exists-action="override">
      <value>@(context.RequestId.ToString())</value>
    </set-header>
  </outbound>
  <on-error>
    <base />
  </on-error>
</policies>
variables.statelessPolicy:
<!--
  Stateless policy: pure round-robin via the pool. No pinning, no idempotency.
  Used for:
    - POST /text:analyze
    - POST /image:analyze
    - POST /text:detectGroundedness
    - POST /text:detectProtectedMaterial
    - POST /text:shieldPrompt
    - GET  /text/blocklists  (list — see README "Notes & limitations")
-->
<policies>
  <inbound>
    <base />
  </inbound>
  <backend>
    <base />
  </backend>
  <outbound>
    <base />
  </outbound>
  <on-error>
    <base />
  </on-error>
</policies>
variables.pinReadPolicy:
<!--
  Blocklist pin-read policy.
  Used for:
    - GET    /text/blocklists/{blocklistName}
    - DELETE /text/blocklists/{blocklistName}
    - GET    /text/blocklists/{blocklistName}/blocklistItems
    - GET    /text/blocklists/{blocklistName}/blocklistItems/{blocklistItemId}

  Looks up cs-blocklist-{name} -> backend-id (cs-primary or cs-secondary) and
  routes the call to the pinned backend. Falls back to the round-robin pool
  on cache miss (the requested blocklist may live on either account, and the
  caller will get a clean 404 from whichever it lands on if the pin is gone).
-->
<policies>
  <inbound>
    <base />
    <set-variable name="blocklistName" value="@((string)context.Request.MatchedParameters["blocklistName"])" />
    <cache-lookup-value
      key="@("cs-blocklist-" + (string)context.Variables["blocklistName"])"
      variable-name="pinnedBackendId"
      caching-type="prefer-external" />
    <choose>
      <when condition="@(context.Variables.ContainsKey("pinnedBackendId") && !string.IsNullOrEmpty((string)context.Variables["pinnedBackendId"]))">
        <set-backend-service backend-id="@((string)context.Variables["pinnedBackendId"])" />
        <trace source="cs-pin" severity="information">
          <message>@($"Pinned blocklist '{(string)context.Variables["blocklistName"]}' to backend '{(string)context.Variables["pinnedBackendId"]}'")</message>
        </trace>
      </when>
      <otherwise>
        <trace source="cs-pin" severity="error">
          <message>@($"Pin cache miss for blocklist '{(string)context.Variables["blocklistName"]}' — falling back to pool. A subsequent 404 is expected if the blocklist lives on the other backend.")</message>
        </trace>
      </otherwise>
    </choose>
  </inbound>
  <backend>
    <base />
  </backend>
  <outbound>
    <base />
  </outbound>
  <on-error>
    <base />
  </on-error>
</policies>
variables.pinWriteIdempotentPolicy:
<!--
  Blocklist mutation policy with idempotency guard + pin write.

  Used for:
    - PATCH /text/blocklists/{blocklistName}
    - POST  /text/blocklists/{blocklistName}:addOrUpdateBlocklistItems
    - POST  /text/blocklists/{blocklistName}:removeBlocklistItems

  Idempotency contract (matches the Stripe / IETF Idempotency-Key draft):
    1. If Idempotency-Key is absent       -> proceed normally (no caching).
    2. Key shape: 1-128 chars, ^[A-Za-z0-9._-]+$. Otherwise 400.
    3. SHA-256(request body) is the fingerprint.
    4. If cs-idem-hash-{key} hits and matches  -> return cached body + Location
       with X-Idempotent-Replay: true.
    5. If hash hits but mismatches             -> 422 IdempotencyKeyConflict.
    6. If a sentinel cs-idem-lock-{key}=InProgress exists -> 409 +
       Retry-After: 5.
    7. Else write the InProgress sentinel (TTL 300 s) and forward upstream.
       On 2xx: store body, hash, location, then set the cs-blocklist-{name}
       pin. The hash is written LAST so a hash hit guarantees body presence.

  TTL for cs-idem-* entries comes from named value {{idempotency-ttl-seconds}};
  APIM substitutes the literal int at policy parse time.
-->
<policies>
  <inbound>
    <base />
    <set-variable name="blocklistName" value="@((string)context.Request.MatchedParameters["blocklistName"])" />
    <set-variable name="idemKey" value="@(context.Request.Headers.GetValueOrDefault("Idempotency-Key",""))" />
    <choose>
      <when condition="@(!string.IsNullOrEmpty((string)context.Variables["idemKey"]))">
        <!-- Validate key shape -->
        <choose>
          <when condition="@{
            var k = (string)context.Variables["idemKey"];
            if (k.Length < 1 || k.Length > 128) { return true; }
            foreach (var c in k) {
              if (!(char.IsLetterOrDigit(c) || c == '.' || c == '_' || c == '-')) { return true; }
            }
            return false;
          }">
            <return-response>
              <set-status code="400" reason="InvalidIdempotencyKey" />
              <set-header name="Content-Type" exists-action="override">
                <value>application/json</value>
              </set-header>
              <set-body>{"code":"InvalidIdempotencyKey","message":"Idempotency-Key must match ^[A-Za-z0-9._-]{1,128}$"}</set-body>
            </return-response>
          </when>
        </choose>

        <!-- Compute SHA-256 of body for fingerprinting -->
        <set-variable name="bodyBytes" value="@(context.Request.Body.As<byte[]>(preserveContent: true))" />
        <set-variable name="bodyHash" value="@{
          var bytes = (byte[])context.Variables["bodyBytes"];
          var sha = System.Security.Cryptography.SHA256.Create();
          var h = sha.ComputeHash(bytes);
          var sb = new System.Text.StringBuilder();
          foreach (var b in h) { sb.Append(b.ToString("x2")); }
          return sb.ToString();
        }" />

        <!-- Look up existing hash -->
        <cache-lookup-value
          key="@("cs-idem-hash-" + (string)context.Variables["idemKey"])"
          variable-name="cachedHash"
          caching-type="prefer-external" />
        <choose>
          <when condition="@(context.Variables.ContainsKey("cachedHash") && !string.IsNullOrEmpty((string)context.Variables["cachedHash"]))">
            <choose>
              <when condition="@((string)context.Variables["cachedHash"] == (string)context.Variables["bodyHash"])">
                <!-- Replay -->
                <cache-lookup-value
                  key="@("cs-idem-" + (string)context.Variables["idemKey"])"
                  variable-name="cachedBody"
                  caching-type="prefer-external" />
                <cache-lookup-value
                  key="@("cs-idem-loc-" + (string)context.Variables["idemKey"])"
                  variable-name="cachedLocation"
                  caching-type="prefer-external" />
                <return-response>
                  <set-status code="201" reason="Created (replayed)" />
                  <set-header name="Content-Type" exists-action="override">
                    <value>application/json</value>
                  </set-header>
                  <set-header name="X-Idempotent-Replay" exists-action="override">
                    <value>true</value>
                  </set-header>
                  <set-header name="Location" exists-action="override">
                    <value>@((string)context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("cachedLocation",""))</value>
                  </set-header>
                  <set-body>@((string)context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("cachedBody",""))</set-body>
                </return-response>
              </when>
              <otherwise>
                <return-response>
                  <set-status code="422" reason="IdempotencyKeyConflict" />
                  <set-header name="Content-Type" exists-action="override">
                    <value>application/json</value>
                  </set-header>
                  <set-body>{"code":"IdempotencyKeyConflict","message":"Same Idempotency-Key seen with a different request body"}</set-body>
                </return-response>
              </otherwise>
            </choose>
          </when>
        </choose>

        <!-- Check in-flight sentinel -->
        <cache-lookup-value
          key="@("cs-idem-lock-" + (string)context.Variables["idemKey"])"
          variable-name="lockState"
          caching-type="prefer-external" />
        <choose>
          <when condition="@(context.Variables.ContainsKey("lockState") && (string)context.Variables["lockState"] == "InProgress")">
            <return-response>
              <set-status code="409" reason="IdempotencyInFlight" />
              <set-header name="Retry-After" exists-action="override">
                <value>5</value>
              </set-header>
              <set-header name="Content-Type" exists-action="override">
                <value>application/json</value>
              </set-header>
              <set-body>{"code":"IdempotencyInFlight","message":"A request with the same Idempotency-Key is in flight; retry per Retry-After."}</set-body>
            </return-response>
          </when>
        </choose>

        <!-- Write the in-flight sentinel (best-effort, no atomic CAS) -->
        <cache-store-value
          key="@("cs-idem-lock-" + (string)context.Variables["idemKey"])"
          value="InProgress"
          duration="300"
          caching-type="prefer-external" />
      </when>
    </choose>

    <!-- Pin lookup (existing pin overrides pool) -->
    <cache-lookup-value
      key="@("cs-blocklist-" + (string)context.Variables["blocklistName"])"
      variable-name="pinnedBackendId"
      caching-type="prefer-external" />
    <choose>
      <when condition="@(context.Variables.ContainsKey("pinnedBackendId") && !string.IsNullOrEmpty((string)context.Variables["pinnedBackendId"]))">
        <set-backend-service backend-id="@((string)context.Variables["pinnedBackendId"])" />
      </when>
    </choose>
  </inbound>
  <backend>
    <base />
  </backend>
  <outbound>
    <base />
    <choose>
      <when condition="@(context.Response.StatusCode >= 200 && context.Response.StatusCode < 300)">
        <!-- Resolve which backend served the response -->
        <set-variable name="resolvedBackendId" value="@{
          var url = context.Request.Url.ToString();
          if (url.Contains("-pri.cognitiveservices")) { return "cs-primary"; }
          if (url.Contains("-sec.cognitiveservices")) { return "cs-secondary"; }
          return "";
        }" />
        <choose>
          <when condition="@(!string.IsNullOrEmpty((string)context.Variables["resolvedBackendId"]))">
            <cache-store-value
              key="@("cs-blocklist-" + (string)context.Variables["blocklistName"])"
              value="@((string)context.Variables["resolvedBackendId"])"
              duration="86400"
              caching-type="prefer-external" />
          </when>
        </choose>

        <!-- Idempotency post-write -->
        <choose>
          <when condition="@(!string.IsNullOrEmpty((string)context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("idemKey","")))">
            <set-variable name="responseBody" value="@(context.Response.Body.As<string>(preserveContent: true))" />
            <set-variable name="locationHdr" value="@(context.Response.Headers.GetValueOrDefault("Location",""))" />
            <cache-store-value
              key="@("cs-idem-" + (string)context.Variables["idemKey"])"
              value="@((string)context.Variables["responseBody"])"
              duration="{{idempotency-ttl-seconds}}"
              caching-type="prefer-external" />
            <cache-store-value
              key="@("cs-idem-loc-" + (string)context.Variables["idemKey"])"
              value="@((string)context.Variables["locationHdr"])"
              duration="{{idempotency-ttl-seconds}}"
              caching-type="prefer-external" />
            <!-- Hash MUST be stored LAST so a hash hit guarantees body presence -->
            <cache-store-value
              key="@("cs-idem-hash-" + (string)context.Variables["idemKey"])"
              value="@((string)context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("bodyHash",""))"
              duration="{{idempotency-ttl-seconds}}"
              caching-type="prefer-external" />
          </when>
        </choose>
      </when>
    </choose>
  </outbound>
  <on-error>
    <base />
  </on-error>
</policies>

properties.description: Application Insights logger for content-safety API
Round-robin pool over both Content Safety accounts
Load-balanced facade over two Azure AI Content Safety accounts

metadata.description: Resource ID of the VNet subnet used for regional VNet integration. Must be delegated to Microsoft.App/environments for FC1.
Resource ID of the storage blob private endpoint. Only used to force the function module to wait for the PE to finish provisioning before the platform restarts the app.
Browser CORS allow-list. Defaults to [] (no browser origins). The Function is meant for server-to-server traffic; only widen this if you fully trust the listed origins.
Maximum request body in bytes (mirrored to MAX_REQUEST_BODY_BYTES). Default 10 MiB matches Content Safety upstream limits.
